interface.longDescription:
Now anyone can turn any idea into a ready-to-share video using just text prompts. From script to visuals to voiceovers and music, Invideo takes care of all the technical complexities, giving you the freedom to focus on your creative vision. 
Whether you’re an entrepreneur, a business leader, or a storyteller, Invideo is the creative partner that’ll help you push boundaries and bring bold ideas to life — effortlessly and with confidence.
defaultPrompt: Make a 5 minute video about why we celebrate Christmas
